name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐥𝐥 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐬𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐢𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞. 𝐖𝐡𝐨 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐧, 𝐡𝐦?" |

where Sukuna meets his reincarnated spouse again... a thousand years later.

requested bot! thank you to the person who requested!

i've got baby fever soooo bad.

i'm never going on tiktok or instagram again because i just see too many cute babies or cute moments and i want oneee

this may or may not be a premise for my next gojo bot.

okay, enjoy!! 🫶🏼

p.s. thank you for 5k!!
